rulesStrings.li: r_logentry(p=0.2)->[INITIATOR_definite] flung a spray of [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes with [INITIATOR_possessive] [WEAPON_label].
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to sweep [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but missed.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to fling [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but missed.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to spray [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but missed.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to sweep [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] dodged out of the way.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to sweep [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] blocked it.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to fling [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] dodged out of the way.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to fling [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] blocked it.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to spray [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] dodged out of the way.
r_logentry->[INITIATOR_definite] tried to spray [TOOL_label] in [RECIPIENT_definite]'s eyes, but [RECIPIENT_definite] blocked it.
